data.name: CATGIRLS DO PORN
data.detailed_description:
Catgirls DO PORN is pure pleasure without the fluff. Beat a level — get a catgirl (kemonomimi) clip. No lore, no dialogs, no grind.

Play → smash blocks → unlock — collect over 100 animated scenes!

🐱 Highlights

  • Classic Arkanoid gameplay: paddle, ball, crunchy clears

  • 100+ unapologetically spicy catgirl animations

  • Lightweight & fast — no bloat, only fun

  • Quick access to scenes — clear and straight to the point

  • Soundtrack that nails the mood: “Chocolate Backdoor”, “Golden Storm”, “Senpai, Be Gentle” and more

Catgirls DO PORN is digital pleasure without shame. Boot it up, break blocks, enjoy the show.

Note: Content is generated, stylized, and non-interactive. Think playful fantasy, not realism.

If you love fast arcade runs and a furry reward for every round, you’re in the right place.

data.short_description: Classic arcade with a spicy twist: clear levels to unlock 100+ hot catgirl videos. Fast, simple, straight to the fun — all wrapped in a soundtrack that sets the perfect mood for one-handed play.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+ or later
  • 處理器: Dual-core 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated or discrete GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
